Advisor: Hi Susan, hi Thomas—good to meet you both. I’m glad you came in. Before we get into numbers, what prompted you to set this meeting up now?
Client 1: Thanks. I’m Susan. We’re trying to make sure the income stays steady as Thomas gets closer to retiring, and I don’t want any avoidable mistakes.
Client 2: And I’m Thomas—yeah, I’m still working, but I’m thinking about timing and not getting boxed in.

Client 2: Yes, married.
